task_completion.description: The presentation is open in LibreOffice Impress and Slide 2 ('System Architecture') is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress is visible with 'platform_architecture.odp' open, and Slide 2 is the active slide in the main workspace.

task_completion.description: Ten component boxes are created with the correct labels and fill colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 10 boxes: 'Web App' and 'Mobile App' (orange); 'API Gateway' (dark blue); 'User Service', 'Product Service', 'Order Service', 'Payment Service' (blue); 'PostgreSQL' and 'MongoDB' (green); 'Redis Cache' (red).

task_completion.description: All component boxes have centered, white, bold text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside the 10 component boxes is white, bolded, and aligned to the center of each box.

task_completion.description: Eleven connector arrows correctly link the components according to the specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Arrows must point from: Web App & Mobile App -> API Gateway; API Gateway -> the 4 services; User, Product, Order, Payment -> PostgreSQL; Order -> MongoDB. Redis Cache should have no incoming arrows.

task_completion.description: Each of the three tiers is enclosed in a dashed-border rectangle with no fill and labeled with the tier name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three large rectangles with dashed borders and transparent/no fill enclose the top, middle, and bottom groups of boxes. They must be labeled 'Client Tier', 'Service Tier', and 'Data Tier'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Impress tools, menus, and canvas, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: The diagram consists of actual shapes and text boxes, not a pasted image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Selection handles, text cursors, or shape properties panels are visible in the screenshots, indicating individual objects were created and manipulated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must be on Slide 2. It requires exactly 10 component boxes: Client Tier (Web App, Mobile App - orange), Service Tier (API Gateway - dark blue; User, Product, Order, Payment Services - blue), Data Tier (PostgreSQL, MongoDB - green; Redis Cache - red). Text must be white, bold, and centered. Exactly 11 connector arrows are required: 2 from clients to API Gateway, 4 from API Gateway to services, and 5 from services to databases (User->PostgreSQL, Product->PostgreSQL, Order->PostgreSQL, Order->MongoDB, Payment->PostgreSQL). Redis Cache has no incoming connections. Each tier must be enclosed in a dashed-border, no-fill rectangle labeled with the tier name ('Client Tier', 'Service Tier', 'Data Tier').
